facets.name: absorbs
data: game.html (whole file) — every mount* subsystem in the legacy modular pattern. Each becomes one legacy-system Thinga whose legacy-mount facet binds the module's {get,set,actions} contract to substrate state via the binding DSL. Authority-flip per CLAUDE.md: as each native facet ships, the corresponding legacy-system Thinga is removed.

data.comment: No tuning per kind — each legacy-system spawn carries its own spec inline in its legacy-mount facet. The spec IS the variant. Future variants COULD share common bindings via a tuning, but inline keeps it readable per-mount.
